column8: orig 0x4092D0 sole-caller IntegrateScriptedVehicleMotion (recovery vehicle_mode==1); port's partial recovery at td5_physics.c:1014-1065 explicitly omits this 4-wheel+4-corner xform/probe/contact-normal call. Citation-sweep header at td5_render.c:6175 marks 'density-match, verify in Phase 4' (not actually present)

orig 0x409520 sole-caller ComputeActorWorldBoundingVolume (recovery path); port has no equivalent. Citation header at td5_physics.c:9837 acknowledges missing port. AngleFromVector12/display_angle_pitch-roll alignment + ResetVehicleActorState gate not present

orig 0x4096B0 sole-caller IntegrateScriptedVehicleMotion (recovery); port omits collision-recovery vector pickup/normal-projection chain entirely (PlayVehicleSoundAtPosition 0x17/0x16, BuildWorldToViewMatrix, recovery_target_m00 rebuild). Citation header td5_physics.c:9838

orig 0x409BF0 explicitly NOT ported per td5_camera.c:2685-2691 ARCH-DIVERGENCE note; sub-helper ExtractEulerAnglesFromMatrix 0x42E030 also unported. UpdateTrafficActorMotion caller route bypassed (traffic uses direct integrate_traffic_pose). td5_physics.c:1025 comment confirms 'Missing'

port at td5_physics.c:1014-1065 implements linvel-x damping (1054) + linvel-z damping (1055) + gravity (1059) + frame_counter>0x3B reset (1061-1064) but MISSES: (1) linvel-y damping before gravity (orig SUB before gravity); (2) Multiply3x3(recovery_target,saved_orientation)->rotation_m00; (3) UpdateActorTrackPosition+ComputeActorTrackContactNormalExtended; (4) render_pos = world_pos*scale; (5) RenderVehicleActorModel+ComputeActorWorldBoundingVolume. World_pos overwritten from +0x208/A/C struct (D11 audit) instead of += velocity
